const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'/api';async function request(path,options){const response=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${path}`,{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',...(options===null||options===void 0?void 0:options.headers)},...options});if(!response.ok){const error=await response.json().catch(()=>({error:'Request failed'}));throw new Error(error.error||`HTTP ${response.status}`);}return response.json();}export const api={// Projects
listProjects:()=>request('/projects'),getProject:id=>request(`/projects/${id}`),createProject:data=>request('/projects',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)}),discoverLocalProjects:()=>request('/projects/discover'),importLocalProjects:()=>request('/projects/import',{method:'POST'}),// Analysis
analyzeProject:(id,code,filename)=>request(`/projects/${id}/analyze`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({code,filename})}),getAnalysisStatus:(projectId,analysisId)=>request(`/projects/${projectId}/analyses/${analysisId}`),// Issues
getIssues:(projectId,params)=>{const qs=new URLSearchParams();if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.severity)qs.set('severity',params.severity);if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.type)qs.set('type',params.type);if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.file)qs.set('file',params.file);if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.resolution)qs.set('resolution',params.resolution);if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.page)qs.set('page',String(params.page));if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.limit)qs.set('limit',String(params.limit));const query=qs.toString()?`?${qs.toString()}`:'';return request(`/projects/${projectId}/issues${query}`);},// Metrics
getMetrics:projectId=>request(`/projects/${projectId}/metrics`),// Quality Gate
getQualityGate:projectId=>request(`/projects/${projectId}/quality-gate`),// Issues Resolving
resolveIssue:(issueId,resolution)=>request(`/projects/issues/${issueId}/resolve`,{method:'PATCH',body:JSON.stringify({resolution})}),// Issue Comments
getIssueComments:issueId=>request(`/issues/${issueId}/comments`),addIssueComment:(issueId,text)=>request(`/issues/${issueId}/comments`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({text})}),updateIssueComment:(commentId,text)=>request(`/comments/${commentId}`,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify({text})}),deleteIssueComment:commentId=>request(`/comments/${commentId}`,{method:'DELETE'}),// Issue Resolution
markIssueFixed:(issueId,message)=>request(`/issues/${issueId}/mark-fixed`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({message})}),markIssueFalsePositive:(issueId,message)=>request(`/issues/${issueId}/mark-false-positive`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({message})}),markIssueWontFix:(issueId,message)=>request(`/issues/${issueId}/mark-wont-fix`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({message})}),// Generic methods for custom endpoints
post:(path,body)=>request(path,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(body)}),put:(path,body)=>request(path,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify(body)}),get:path=>request(path)};
